item.title: Clarity Over Jargon 🎯 • Tailor your resume to the job—no generic lists. • Quantify achievements: Use numbers to show impact. • Skip buzzwords; use clear, specific language. • Highlight relevant skills with real examples. • Proofread to catch typos and awkward phrasing. How can you simplify your resume to highlight key achievements? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Clarity Over Jargon 🎯 • Tailor your resume to the job—no generic lists. • Quantify achievements: Use numbers to show impact. • Skip buzzwords; use clear, specific language. • Highlight relevant skills with real examples. • Proofread to catch typos and awkward phrasing. How can you simplify your resume to highlight key achievements? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
